contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: JDM Tokyo Motorsports is your trusted source for premium Japanese domestic market engines and transmissions, sourced directly from Japan.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: JDM Tokyo Motorsports was founded by a group of passionate JDM enthusiasts who saw a gap in the market for reliable, quality-inspected Japanese engines and transmissions in the United States.
story.p2: We established direct relationships with trusted dismantlers and importers in Japan, allowing us to source low-mileage units — typically under 65,000 miles — that meet our strict quality standards before they ever leave Japan.
story.p3: Today, we ship nationwide and have helped thousands of customers find the perfect engine or transmission for their build, swap, or repair. Our team of experts is always available to help you find the right fitment.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: Every unit is inspected and compression-tested before shipping. We stand behind every product we sell.

direct.title: Direct Import
direct.description: We source directly from Japan, cutting out middlemen and passing the savings to you with competitive pricing.

shipping.title: Nationwide Shipping
shipping.description: We ship to all 50 states via freight carriers. Business and residential delivery options available.

warranty.title: 30-Day Warranty
warranty.description: Every engine and transmission comes with a 30-day warranty against defects and compression failures.

support.title: Expert Support
support.description: Our team of JDM specialists is available by phone and email to help with fitment questions and technical support.

performance.title: Performance Heritage
performance.description: We specialize in high-performance JDM engines — from the legendary 2JZ to the iconic B18C and RB26.

source.title: Trusted Source
source.description: Every unit is sourced from verified dismantlers and importers in Japan with full documentation and history.

mileage.title: Low Mileage
mileage.description: Most of our engines and transmissions have under 65,000 miles — ensuring reliability and longevity for your build.

whyUs.title: Why Choose JDM Tokyo Motorsports
whyUs.p1: When you buy from JDM Tokyo Motorsports, you're getting a unit that has been sourced, inspected, and vetted by people who love these engines as much as you do. We don't just sell parts — we help you build.
whyUs.p2: With over 10 years of importing experience and thousands of satisfied customers, we are one of the most trusted JDM suppliers in the United States. Our transparent process, honest descriptions, and responsive customer service set us apart.

warranty.title: Warranty Policy
warranty.subtitle: Every engine and transmission sold by JDM Tokyo Motorsports comes with our comprehensive warranty.

overview.title: 30-Day Warranty on All Units
overview.description: JDM Tokyo Motorsports warrants all engines and transmissions against defects in materials and workmanship for 30 days from the date of delivery. If your unit fails within this period due to a covered defect, we will replace it or provide a full refund.

coverage.title: What Is Covered
coverage.item1: Compression failures not disclosed at time of sale
coverage.item2: Internal mechanical defects present at time of shipment
coverage.item3: Incorrect unit shipped (wrong engine code or model)
coverage.item4: Units with undisclosed damage discovered upon inspection
coverage.item5: Significant mileage discrepancy from listed specification

exclusions.title: What Is Not Covered
exclusions.item1: Damage caused by improper installation or modification
exclusions.item2: Normal wear and tear during operation
exclusions.item3: Damage caused by overheating, lack of oil, or coolant issues after installation
exclusions.item4: External components such as sensors, wiring harnesses, or accessories

claims.title: How to File a Claim
claims.step1: Contact our team by phone (+1 800 536-8669) or email (sales@jdmtokyomotors.com) within 30 days of delivery.
claims.step2: Provide your order number, photos of the unit, and a description of the issue.
claims.step3: Our team will review your claim within 1–2 business days and provide a resolution.
claims.step4: Approved claims will receive a replacement unit or full refund processed through Stripe.

duration.title: Warranty Duration
duration.description: The warranty period begins on the date of delivery as confirmed by the freight carrier. Claims must be submitted within 30 calendar days of delivery to be eligible.

shippingPage.title: Shipping Information
shippingPage.subtitle: We ship all engines and transmissions nationwide via freight carriers.

business.title: Business Address
business.description: Delivery to a commercial address with a loading dock or forklift. Fastest and most affordable option for shop owners and businesses.

residential.title: Residential Address
residential.description: Delivery to a home or residential address. Includes liftgate service for safe unloading at your driveway.

carriers.title: Shipping Carriers
carriers.description: We partner with trusted freight carriers to ensure safe delivery of your engine or transmission.

step1.label: Order Processing (1–2 Business Days)
step1.description: After payment is confirmed, your order is processed and the unit is prepared for shipping.

step2.label: Transit Time (3–7 Business Days)
step2.description: Freight transit times vary by destination. West Coast orders typically arrive faster than East Coast.

step3.label: Tracking Notification
step3.description: You will receive tracking information via email once your order ships from our facility.

notes.title: Important Shipping Notes
notes.description: All engines and transmissions are palletized and wrapped for safe transit. You will need to inspect your shipment upon delivery and note any visible damage on the bill of lading before signing. Contact us immediately if damage is discovered.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.subtitle: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase.

policy.title: Return Policy
policy.p1: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery for units that qualify under our return policy. All refunds are processed through Stripe and typically appear within 5–10 business days.
policy.p2: To initiate a return, please contact our team by phone or email with your order number and reason for return. We will provide return shipping instructions.

eligible.title: Eligible for Return
eligible.item1: Defective units covered under our 30-day warranty
eligible.item2: Incorrect unit shipped (wrong engine code or model)

nonEligible.title: Not Eligible for Return
nonEligible.item1: Units that have been installed or modified
nonEligible.item2: Returns requested after 30 days from delivery
nonEligible.item3: Units damaged due to improper installation or misuse

process.title: Return Process
process.step1: Contact us by phone (+1 800 536-8669) or email (sales@jdmtokyomotors.com) to initiate your return.
process.step2: Provide your order number and photos documenting the issue.
process.step3: We will review your request within 1–2 business days and issue a return authorization if approved.
process.step4: Return the unit in its original packaging. Once received and inspected, your refund will be processed through Stripe.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, phone number, shipping address, and payment information when you place an order. We also collect technical information about your device and browsing behavior to improve our website.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.content: We use the information we collect to process your orders, send order confirmations and shipping notifications, respond to your inquiries, improve our website and services, and send promotional communications if you have opted in.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We share your information only with service providers who help us operate our business (such as Stripe for payment processing and freight carriers for delivery), and when required by law.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience, remember your preferences, and analyze website traffic. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure. Payment information is processed securely by Stripe and is never stored on our servers.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of promotional communications at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link in any email or contacting us directly.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at sales@jdmtokyomotors.com or call +1 (800) 536-8669. We are available Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM PST.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using the JDM Tokyo Motorsports website, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website or purchase our products.

products.title: Products and Descriptions
products.content: We make every effort to accurately describe our products, including mileage, condition, and compatibility information. However, minor variations may occur. All products are used Japanese domestic market units unless otherwise specified.

orders.title: Orders and Cancellations
orders.content: Orders are subject to acceptance and availability. We reserve the right to cancel or refuse any order at our discretion. If we cancel your order, you will receive a full refund. Order cancellations by the customer must be requested before the order ships.

payment.title: Payment
payment.content: All prices are in US dollars. Payment is processed securely through Stripe. By providing payment information, you represent that you are authorized to use the payment method. We do not store credit card information on our servers.

shipping.title: Shipping and Delivery
shipping.content: Shipping rates are $500 for business addresses and $700 for residential addresses, shipped via freight carrier. Delivery times are estimates and not guaranteed. Risk of loss transfers to you upon delivery to the freight carrier.

returns.title: Returns and Refunds
returns.content: Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for eligible items as described in our Returns Policy. Refunds are processed through Stripe and may take 5–10 business days to appear on your statement.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: JDM Tokyo Motorsports shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our products or website. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid for the product in question.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the State of California. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Los Angeles County, California. If any provision of these terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full effect.
